title: Skyrim: incredibly lucky arrow shot while fighting two dragons
description:
Me slaughtering a blood dragon and an elder dragon, plus some other creatures passing my way. It's hard to see, but the last arrow shot at 0:24 misses the target (the dragon's health bar doesn't decrease), however the same arrow hits the dragon on its way down to the ground 6 seconds later at 0:30 (see the health bar and the shock damage graphic effect on the dragon - I was using a lightning-enchanted bow). I noticed it only after I uploaded the video and deleted the original HQ one, so I had no chance to show it clearly with a zoom :(

Difficulty level: normal (adept).
Weapons:
1 - Nightingale bow (legendary) + ebony arrows;
2 - Daedric sword of the inferno (legendary) + shield of Ysgramor.
No potions used.
